title: oxybasis glauca subsp. salina
intro: Oxybasis glauca subsp. salina, also known as annual glasswort or saltwort, is a type of succulent plant that thrives in coastal areas and saline environments. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to its high concentration of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Oxybasis glauca subsp. salina include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Oxybasis glauca subsp. salina is traditionally prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
